summary: Single-cell ATAC sequencing is feasible due to advancements enabling parallel epigenomic profiling from individual cells, as evidenced by successful applications such as analyzing circulatory tumor cell populations. The technology allows for simultaneous assessment of chromatin accessibility across multiple cellular contexts within complex samples.
